mapper.sql: id, title, artist, url, cover, lyrics, sort, status, create_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM blog_music WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY sort ASC, create_time DESC
SELECT FROM blog_music ORDER BY sort ASC, create_time DESC
SELECT FROM blog_music ORDER BY sort ASC, create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_music (title, artist, url, cover, lyrics, sort, status) VALUES (#{title}, #{artist}, #{url}, #{cover}, #{lyrics}, #{sort}, #{status})
